description_long: This is a modern outdoor bench featuring a seat and backrest made from three parallel wooden planks, finished in a light tan color. The bench is supported by two robust, rectangular metal legs in a dark gray finish, which extend upward to frame the backrest. The design is minimalistic and functional, with no armrests, allowing for easy access from either side. The seat and backrest planks are evenly spaced, providing both comfort and ventilation. The materials and construction suggest durability and resistance to weather, making it suitable for parks, sidewalks, or public plazas. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, blending well with urban environments.
description: A modern, backrest-equipped bench with light tan wooden planks and sturdy dark gray metal legs, designed for outdoor urban use. The bench is minimalistic, durable, and lacks armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three wooden seat planks, matching backrest, and the two wide metal legs framing the bench.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest planks, as well as the depth of the metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden backrest and the full width of the metal supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the seat and backrest planks and the supporting legs.
